zh.lifeSummary: 當John Edward Stephens VII於1459年10月21日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Thomas Stephens39歲，母親Alice Spelley35歲。他和Lady Joan Alice Atheward至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1505年10月27日在英國格盧斯特斯爾福洛斯特享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Edward Stephens VII于1459年10月21日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Thomas Stephens39岁，母亲Alice Spelley35岁。他和Lady Joan Alice Atheward至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1505年10月27日在英国格盧斯特斯爾福洛斯特享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When John Edward Stephens VII was born on 21 October 1459, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Stephens, was 39 and his mother, Alice Spelley, was 35. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Joan Alice Atheward. He died on 27 October 1505, in Frocester, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Edward Stephens VII est né le 21 octobre 1459, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Stephens, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice Spelley, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Joan Alice Atheward. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1505, à Frocester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Edward Stephens VII am 21. Oktober 1459 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Stephens 39 und seine Mutter Alice Spelley 35. Er hatte mit Lady Joan Alice Atheward mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1505 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Frocester, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Edward Stephens VII è nato il il 21 ottobre 1459 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Stephens, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Alice Spelley, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Joan Alice Atheward. Morì il 27 ottobre 1505, nel Frocester, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Edward Stephens VIIが1459年10月21日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Stephensは39歳，母Alice Spelleyは35歳であった。彼はLady Joan Alice Athewardとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1505年10月27日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフロセスターで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Edward Stephens VII(이)가 1459년 10월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Stephens(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Spelley(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Lady Joan Alice Atheward(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 10월 27일 영국 그루스스터실르 프록스터에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.21 October 1459–27 October 1505: 21 de outubro de 1459–27 de outubro de 1505
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Edward Stephens VII nasceu em 21 de outubro de 1459, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Stephens, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice Spelley, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Joan Alice Atheward. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1505, em Frocester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Edward Stephens VII родился 21 октября 1459 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Stephens было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Spelley, 35. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Lady Joan Alice Atheward. Он умер 27 октября 1505 г. в местности фросестир, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.21 October 1459–27 October 1505: 21 de octubre de 1459–27 de octubre de 1505
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Edward Stephens VII nació el 21 de octubre de 1459, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Stephens, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice Spelley, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Joan Alice Atheward. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1505, en Frocester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
